title: Galaxy Client Remake
description: Enjoy smooth PvP with Galaxy Client visuals and Dark GUI.Simple, and stylish gameplay made for every Minecraft player who loves seamless battles.
body:
Galaxy Client: 
Galaxy Client Texture Pack is made for players who want smooth, clean, and fast PvP gameplay. It removes explosion particles and totem pop effects for a clear, lag-free experience. The clear GUI helps you see your health, armor, and hotbar easily, while shorter swords give a better view during fights.

Animated items make your tools and weapons look cool without being too flashy. The dark interface gives a modern galaxy theme that’s easy on the eyes. Smaller food textures keep your screen neat and organized.

Overall, the Galaxy Client Pack combines performance and style — perfect for PvP players who love a clean, dark, and competitive setup.
(Btw Made In India 🇮🇳)
